title: androsace minor
intro: Androsace minor, also known as Alpine rose or Pygmy-flowered rock jasmine, is a low-growing, perennial alpine plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Androsace minor include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. Androsace minor is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
